description_long: This is a weathered, yellow parking meter with a boxy upper section and a single, sturdy mounting post. The front face features a display area with printed instructions and a postal logo, as well as a coin slot and a small window for ticket or receipt dispensing. The sides and back are covered in graffiti and show signs of wear, with some faded stickers and markings. The mounting post is rectangular and tapers slightly as it meets the ground, with additional graffiti and a small label near the base. The surface is metallic and painted, with visible scratches, dents, and patches of rust. The overall appearance suggests long-term outdoor use in an urban environment.
description: A weathered yellow parking meter with a boxy top, graffiti, and a sturdy metal post. The front features a display, coin slot, and postal logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display area, coin slot, postal logo, and some graffiti.
description_view_1: Left side view dominated by heavy graffiti and visible wear, with the post and side panel clearly shown.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a mostly plain yellow surface with faded graffiti and a sticker, no visible interface.
description_view_3: Right side view with additional graffiti, a partial logo, and the post with a small label.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin slot is visible on the front face, along with a display window and printed instructions. No card or contactless payment interface is visible.
attribute_coin_slot: Present on the front face, rectangular with a horizontal slit, located below the display area and above the postal logo.
attribute_mounting_post: Present; made of painted steel, rectangular in cross-section, tapers slightly, and is attached directly to the bottom of the main meter body.
